pi_items.source: setup_task.sh operations brief and verifier.py SPEED_TARGET
setup_task.sh operations brief and verifier.py altitude range checks
setup_task.sh operations brief and verifier.py trigger checks
setup_task.sh operations brief and verifier.py wp_count checks

privileged_info_summary: The task relies on a synthetically generated operations brief providing mission parameters. The required QGC plan path is /home/ga/Documents/QGC/mapping_camera_mission.plan, the operations brief path is /home/ga/Documents/QGC/mapping_ops_brief.txt, and the export result is saved to /tmp/task_result.json. The mission strictly requires the vehicle parameter WPNAV_SPEED to be set to 800 (8 m/s), an altitude of 120 meters for a minimum of 4 waypoints, and a camera trigger interval of 25 meters, which have all been verified against the setup scripts and verifier constraints.
